raw_action_dict.reasoning: Track continues gently leftward but waypoint 76 is slightly to the right of current heading (delta=-9.9°), so a small right correction of -5° is appropriate at full speed.
knowledge: Track has a left-curving section around waypoints 55-75, heading southwest then west

Use steering_angle=0 for |delta| <5° to avoid oscillation on near-straight sections
